case_title: CHAIA MAY VS. IT'S JUST LUNCH

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-14-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CHAIA MAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMY JAYNE PUBLIC RELATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,300.00 FILED BY MAY, CHAIA AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAY, CHAIA AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAY, CHAIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH $3,188.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,278.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
